description_long: This is a weathered, three-door metal storage locker with a military green finish and visible signs of rust and wear, suggesting long-term use in a rugged environment. The front features three vertically aligned doors, each with horizontal ventilation slits and simple round knobs for opening. Two of the doors have paper notices or stickers affixed, adding to its utilitarian, urban character. The middle door is slightly ajar, revealing a glimpse of the interior, which appears to be hollow and suitable for storing personal items or equipment. The sides and back are plain, with the back showing vertical weld lines and more pronounced rust patches. The overall construction is robust, indicating it is designed for durability in public or semi-public spaces such as garages, industrial facilities, or outdoor urban areas.
description: A rugged, three-door metal storage locker with a green, rusted finish and ventilation slits, showing signs of heavy use and urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing three doors with horizontal slits, round knobs, and two paper notices; the middle door is slightly open.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat metal surface with visible wear and no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the solid back panel with vertical weld lines and rust patches, no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, showing a flat, worn metal surface.
